text.tspan: all-by-all clustering to get edge graph table
Add edges between sequences with highest reciprocal similarity and overlap.
Split graph components when >1 sequence from a sample is encountered.
Re-insert paired spacer, align each side, and get consensus for each graph component.
delimit locus BEDs based on mapping positions of RAD-seq samples.
WGS samples can be added using only reads mapping inside the RAD locus BEDs.
filter locus BEDs exhibiting evidence of paralogy
make variant calls per sample or population in each BED
filter variants and locus BEDS across samples and
export consensus alignments and variants files
WGS reads are filtered by additional mapping criteria
